disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe lower-back pain after trivial bending, with inability to weight-bear or stand
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing when the pain started?
Can you stand or walk at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I only bent to pick up a slipper and something cracked in my spine — now I can't move my legs to stand up at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several weeks of deep, unremitting bone pain in the back and ribs preceding the acute event
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any pain in the lead-up to this?
How long has your back been bothering you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For the last few weeks there's been a deep aching in my back and lower ribs that just keeps getting worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Months of profound fatigue, malaise and unintentional weight loss of about 5 kg
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself over the last few months?
Any change in your weight or energy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been exhausted and off-colour for months and I've lost about 5 kilos without trying.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New spontaneous bruising on both forearms
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any easy bruising or bleeding?
Any marks on your skin you can't explain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've got a lot of bruises on my arms and I don't remember bumping them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two episodes of pneumonia requiring antibiotics within the past year
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any infections recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had pneumonia twice this year and needed antibiotics both times.

trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your urine?
Does your wee look different at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My wee has looked really frothy and bubbly lately.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe pain completely unresponsive to oral paracetamol
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain?
Did the paracetamol help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took two paracetamol an hour ago and it did absolutely nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently no numbness, tingling, or loss of bladder or bowel control (pertinent negative for established cord compression)
trigger_question_examples: Can you feel your legs normally?
Any loss of control of your bladder or bowels?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can still feel my legs and I haven't lost control of my bladder or bowels — but the pain stops me moving them.
